security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Tiny notepad demo built with Courvux + Tauri.
bundle.longDescription: Notepad demo showcasing the Courvux UI framework running inside Tauri 2 with build-time precompiled template expressions, strict Content-Security-Policy (no unsafe-eval), and Tailwind 4 for styling.
